series_metadata.series_description: Documents (O.R.C. 5726.04(E)) identifying whether a financial institutions tax rate adjustment is required including any spreadsheets, data, programming algorithms, and/or calculations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
